excerpt: In this post, we explore what makes the Nemotron 3 architecture unique, walk through the fine-tuning techniques available, and show you step-by-step how to get started with serverless customization using SageMaker Studio.
summary_hint: In this post, we explore what makes the Nemotron 3 architecture unique, walk through the fine-tuning techniques available, and show you step-by-step how to get started with serverless customization using SageMaker Studio.
title: Fine-tune NVIDIA Nemotron 3 models with Amazon SageMaker AI serverless model customization
